description: Core trigger and routing evals for the Contextro MCP skill. Aligned to Anthropic skill guidance: concise frontmatter, correct triggering, problem-first routing, and avoidance of token-heavy anti-patterns.

source_docs: Anthropic effective harnesses for long-running agents

categories.triggering: Skill loads on obvious and paraphrased Contextro requests
categories.routing: Correct Contextro tool chosen for the user task
categories.anti_pattern: Agent avoids wasteful or unsafe alternatives when Contextro fits
categories.response_format: Agent correctly interprets compact response keys and implicit fields

evals.name: trigger-index-project
evals.prompt: Index this project at /Users/alice/platform so I can search it.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls index with the path, then status before using search-oriented tools.

assertions.text: index is called with the requested path
assertions.passing_condition: index tool called with path='/Users/alice/platform'

assertions.text: status is used after index
assertions.passing_condition: status() called after index() and before any search/find_symbol/explain call

evals.name: trigger-search-concept
evals.prompt: Search the codebase for how rate limiting is implemented.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent uses search for conceptual discovery.

assertions.text: search is used for concept search
assertions.passing_condition: search called with a rate-limiting-related query

evals.name: trigger-find-callers
evals.prompt: Who calls the authenticate function?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent uses find_callers.

assertions.text: find_callers is used
assertions.passing_condition: find_callers called with 'authenticate'

evals.name: trigger-impact-analysis
evals.prompt: What breaks if I change the TokenBudget class?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent uses impact before giving change advice.

assertions.text: impact is used for blast radius
assertions.passing_condition: impact called with 'TokenBudget'

evals.name: trigger-commit-history
evals.prompt: What changed in the search pipeline last week?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent uses commit_search or commit_history.

assertions.text: history tools are used instead of shell git log
assertions.passing_condition: commit_search or commit_history called, not git log shell command

evals.name: trigger-compaction-recovery
evals.prompt: Context was compacted. Recover what I was doing on the payment flow refactor.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent starts with session_snapshot, then recall.

assertions.text: session_snapshot is called first
assertions.passing_condition: session_snapshot() is the first Contextro tool called

assertions.text: archive recall is considered
assertions.passing_condition: recall called with memory_type='archive' or after session_snapshot

evals.name: trigger-sandbox-retrieve
evals.prompt: Retrieve the full results for sandbox reference sx_abc12345.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent uses retrieve.

assertions.text: retrieve is called with ref id
assertions.passing_condition: retrieve called with ref_id='sx_abc12345'

evals.name: trigger-cross-repo
evals.prompt: Add the backend repo at /Users/alice/backend so I can search across both projects.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent uses repo_add.

assertions.text: repo_add is used
assertions.passing_condition: repo_add called with path='/Users/alice/backend'

evals.name: no-trigger-general-coding
evals.prompt: Write a Python function that reverses a string.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does not load for generic coding that does not need repo discovery.

assertions.text: no Contextro tools are called
assertions.passing_condition: No index/search/find_symbol/explain/impact or other Contextro tool called

evals.name: no-trigger-general-knowledge
evals.prompt: What is the difference between TCP and UDP?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does not load for general knowledge questions.

assertions.text: no Contextro tools are called
assertions.passing_condition: No Contextro tools called

evals.name: no-trigger-direct-single-file-read
evals.prompt: Open pyproject.toml and tell me the package version.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does not load because the user already named one direct file and a simple read is cheaper.

assertions.text: Contextro is not used for a direct known-file read
assertions.passing_condition: No Contextro tools called before reading pyproject.toml directly

evals.name: routing-find-symbol-vs-search
evals.prompt: Find the definition of IndexingPipeline.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses find_symbol because the exact symbol name is known.

assertions.text: find_symbol is used
assertions.passing_condition: find_symbol called with 'IndexingPipeline'

evals.name: routing-search-for-concept
evals.prompt: How does the caching layer work?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses search for a broad concept.

assertions.text: search is used for a concept
assertions.passing_condition: search called with a caching-related query

evals.name: routing-bm25-for-exact-identifier
evals.prompt: Find all occurrences of CTX_STORAGE_DIR in the codebase.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses search with bm25 for an exact identifier.

assertions.text: search bm25 is used
assertions.passing_condition: search called with mode='bm25' or mode='keyword'

evals.name: routing-impact-before-refactor
evals.prompt: I want to delete the FlashReranker class. Is that safe?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls impact before any deletion recommendation.

assertions.text: impact is called before change advice
assertions.passing_condition: impact called with 'FlashReranker'

assertions.text: agent does not recommend deletion first
assertions.passing_condition: Response does not recommend deletion before impact analysis

evals.name: routing-overview-for-orientation
evals.prompt: I just joined this repo. How many files does it have and what languages does it use?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses overview for orientation instead of shell listing or broad manual reads.

assertions.text: overview is used
assertions.passing_condition: overview() called

assertions.text: agent avoids shell ls or broad glob first
assertions.passing_condition: No ls or glob command before overview

evals.name: anti-pattern-no-serial-find-symbol
evals.prompt: Show me the source for IndexingPipeline, EmbeddingService, and RustworkxCodeGraph.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses one lookup_symbols call instead of three separate symbol lookups.

assertions.text: lookup_symbols is used for batching
assertions.passing_condition: code called with operation='lookup_symbols' and all three symbol names

assertions.text: three serial find_symbol calls are avoided
assertions.passing_condition: find_symbol called at most once, not three times

evals.name: anti-pattern-compact-vs-remember
evals.prompt: My context window is almost full. Archive the key findings from this session before compaction happens.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses compact, not remember.

assertions.text: compact is used for pre-compaction archival
assertions.passing_condition: compact called with content summarizing session findings

assertions.text: remember is not substituted for compact
assertions.passing_condition: Agent uses compact, not remember, for pre-compaction archiving

evals.name: response-format-compact-keys
evals.prompt: Search for the authentication middleware.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent correctly reads compact keys n/f/l/c from search results and presents them as name/file/line/code to the user.

assertions.text: agent reads n as symbol name
assertions.passing_condition: Agent presents the value of 'n' as the symbol name in its response

assertions.text: agent reads f as file path
assertions.passing_condition: Agent presents the value of 'f' as the file location

evals.name: response-format-sandbox-ref-implies-sandboxed
evals.prompt: Find all callers of the search function.
evals.expected_behavior: If the response contains sandbox_ref but no sandboxed field, agent still treats it as sandboxed and calls retrieve.

assertions.text: agent calls retrieve when sandbox_ref is present
assertions.passing_condition: retrieve called with sandbox_ref value when sandbox_ref appears in response, regardless of whether sandboxed field is present

evals.name: response-format-confidence-omitted-means-high
evals.prompt: Find the IndexingPipeline class.
evals.expected_behavior: If search response has no confidence field, agent treats it as high confidence and does not ask for clarification.

assertions.text: missing confidence is treated as high
assertions.passing_condition: Agent does not ask for clarification or re-search when confidence field is absent from response

evals.name: response-format-indexed-omitted-means-true
evals.prompt: Check if the codebase is indexed.
evals.expected_behavior: If status response has no indexed field but has codebase_path, agent treats it as indexed.

assertions.text: missing indexed field with codebase_path means indexed
assertions.passing_condition: Agent reports the codebase as indexed when codebase_path is present even if indexed field is absent

evals.name: response-format-find-symbol-flat
evals.prompt: Find the AuthManager class.
evals.expected_behavior: When find_symbol returns a single result as a flat object (no symbols wrapper), agent reads it directly.

assertions.text: agent reads flat single-result find_symbol response
assertions.passing_condition: Agent correctly extracts name, file, line from a flat find_symbol response without expecting a symbols array

evals.name: response-format-callers-list
evals.prompt: Who calls authenticate?
evals.expected_behavior: find_callers returns {callers: [...]} — agent reads the callers list directly.

assertions.text: agent reads callers from {callers: [...]} format
assertions.passing_condition: Agent presents callers from the callers array without expecting a total field
